headline: Magazine opening now reads lighter on mobile, with tighter hero cards and faster dispatch scanning.
notes: Magazine hero copy is tightened again so the opening asks for less reading before a user can choose a city or jump into planner.
Hero support cards are trimmed down with shorter supporting lines and a clearer utility note, making the first screen feel more editorial and less memo-like.
Dispatch cards now carry small context pills and shorter copy, so weekend, rainy-day, and with-parents bases scan faster on mobile.
Spacing, card density, and mobile typography are tuned again so the opening rhythm feels lighter before the user reaches the city finder.
